posts.title: Πλάνο vs ΜΠΑΛΙΤΣΑ — UFA Game 1
posts.body:
## Πλάνο για το παιχνίδι vs ΜΠΑΛΙΤΣΑ 🔮

**POSITIONS + STARTING 7** *(name on top of the position starts)*

![Τοποθέτηση & Αρχική 7αδα](/uploads/ufa26-game1-lineup.png)

We don't know how Mpalitsa plays so we will just focus on our game.

Same formation - same idea to dominate. We have to play as One and I prepared you the shapes we have to play with:

**When we attack we transform into AN UPSIDEDOWN PYRAMID:**

![Σχήμα Επίθεσης — Ανεστραμμένη Πυραμίδα](/uploads/ufa26-game1-attack-shape.png)

**When we defend we transform into a PYRAMID:**

![Σχήμα Άμυνας — Πυραμίδα](/uploads/ufa26-game1-defence-shape.png)

You already do it, this is how our formation transforms. I'm showing you this so we now better understand the advantages of this formation and play more intentionally.

Check out the animation with exact movements on how you can play:

🎬 [MOVEMENT IDEA — ANIMATION](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1PdhLp0u-RrEDii0nogsRcLZrGbvBxklY/view?usp=sharing)

Review the animation, watch closely the movement of the position you play and visualise in your head how you will be moving during the game.

Let this reduce your game anxiety because you will know exactly where to go. This animation provides you with ideas on how our team should move, don't overthink it, don't be too much in your head during the game — this should give you ideas and options not an additional stress.

---

**2 more animations with build-up combinations:**

🎬 [BUILD-UP 1 — ANIMATION](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1pVrsKa5zGBxqdoqqscqWGewyiOjcL7R7/view?usp=sharing)

🎬 [BUILD-UP 2 — ANIMATION](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1QogDxQM2xSBWhfR3Y0TtUkzPyJQvRJLh/view?usp=sharing)

- You see I drew a square to show you that you create a Skulaki situation
- Once Stringer receives the ball — it triggers FullBack and CM to start their run to attack
- Stringer (with their back to the goal) plays here as a Kolona and plays the pass either to FullBack or to CM

These are all the things that you know and you practiced so I'm sure you can do it, you just need to synchronize with each other and that's why you should keep trying.

Maybe 5 times it will not lead anywhere but then 2 times it will work and we will find a goal.

---

**And of course, our pressing. I have made a more comprehensive animation:**

🎬 [PRESSING IDEA — ANIMATION](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1cUKqQM-cNr4BTgoW7pKmsajJofSQ5ALE/view?usp=sharing)

---

## Γενική τακτική:

1. There are no accidental mistakes — we force them to make mistakes.
2. More shots — a target will be announced before the game
3. We speak to each other
4. **Wide** in the attack — *compact* in defence
5. As soon as we lose possession the full backs return to defence
6. We create familiar patterns — squares of players to play skulaki, kolona, 1-2s, etc
7. We stay present in the game, don't turn off when it's their throw-in or corner. We control the tempo when the ball is ours.
8. Stringers PRESS the ball, the rest MARK players individually.
9. I want to see a spiritual connection between a Stringer and Full back of the same wing.
10. You are the best — ΠΑΜΕ ΜΠΕΚΑΤΣΕΣ 🔥

posts.title: Πλάνο vs ΦΑΛΤΣΑ — UFA Game 3
posts.body:
Omadara mou!

Our total score after 2 games at UFA is 1:6! When I say it out loud I don't think of a failure, I think of Kantofla with a pink bow laughing with a beer after the last year's game against Abalos! There is no more pressure for result and we don't have any expectations, except to enjoy the match day, make some shots, make some tackles and have some laughs and some beers afterwards.

**This is the formation:**

![Τοποθέτηση & Αρχική 7αδα](/uploads/ufa26-game3-lineup.png)

Evelyn will be subbed by either Xristina or Mastro whenever she needs rest, but I need her to play most of the time. We need to use our full-backs' speed and dribbling so we have to move the game to wings as much as possible, including Evelyn who I want to move to wings when we have a ball. We need to play wide and make the field BIG!

---

**3 animations to watch:**

🎬 **1) Throw-in tricky trick**

🎬 **2) Throw-in where CM changes positions with a stringer**

🎬 **3) Build-up for a looooong ball**

---

We need to play as ONE, we all attack and we all defend. We win and we lose together!

**ΠΑΜΕ ΜΠΕΚΑΤΣΕΣ!** 🔥
